task: Go to the URL and complete the rich text form by filling in all required fields including the rich text editor. If needed, create a file. Validate that the form was filled and submitted successfully. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/rich-text-form.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to the provided URL and completed all aspects of the task. It correctly identified and filled the rich text editor for the email address, selected the country, entered the date of birth, and chose the preferred contact method. The agent also successfully created a temporary file and uploaded it to the form. After submitting the form, it validated the successful submission by identifying the 'Success! Form submitted successfully!' message on the page. The agent demonstrated good problem-solving by recovering from an initial attempt to `require('fs/promises')` in the REPL, correctly using the available `fs` object instead. All key points of the task were met, and the final output and screenshots confirm the successful completion.
